caption: The video shows a screen recording of a website featuring a "List Randomizer." The page displays a numbered list from 1 to 10 and an advisory stating, "We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain. Other sites that claim to be operated by us are imposters." A chat window on the right contains messages from "Nightbot," including a prompt to "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://rb.nz/3Ske8K9." An image of a hockey player in a black and white jersey is visible, alongside a logo for "CASEBREAKS.COM." At the bottom of the page, the website indicates, "You have randomized this list 5 times." Across the sequence of frames, the visual content remains static, with no movement or changes occurring in the layout, text, or imagery.
